a.xlink:title: More inherited virtual funcs: request comes in for mesh stats.
Inherited virtual. Returns entire volume of compartment.
Returns index of first data entry on this node.
Returns number of data entries across all nodes.
True if there is a copy of every dataEntry on all nodes.
Returns number of local data entries on this node.
Returns node number of specified dataIndex.
Virtual function to return volume of mesh Entry.
